commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As I live, says the LORD, though Coniah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah were the signet upon my right hand, yet would I pluck you from there; Jechonias: Joachin, (4 Kings xxiv. ; Worthington) or Chenias, who did not take warning by his predecessor's misfortune. Ring, or seal, if he were most dear to me, the prime minister of the greatest monarch, Aggeus ii. (Calmet) Alexander the Great gave his ring to Perdiccas, designating him his successor, or regent.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
